strategy: Understand the two punishers. Drake zaps any damage/pierce Charm, Trap, Aura, or Global for 500 Storm, and his partner Quentin counter-casts based on the type of hanging effect you play.

Use single-target buffs on your hitter, not multi-target. Drake's Duck Savage lands on the receiver of a single-target buff but redirects to the caster on multi-target spells, so avoid Bladestorm-style setup.
Turn Quentin's counters into free setup: cast a single-target harmful Charm on Drake and Quentin answers with a Balanceblade, and a harmful Ward gets you a Tower Shield. Bait the ones that help you.
Avoid the punishing answers: helpful Charms on your team draw Weakness, helpful Wards draw Hex, and all-enemy curses draw Bladestorm or Legion Shield for the bosses.

He is Storm with heavy resist across the board (36% most schools, 56% Fire, 16% Ice) and no boost school, plus 194% damage, so this is a team burst: minimize triggers, stack on one hitter, and swing once.
Since almost every buff triggers something, keep setup lean, use protected/Aegis blades where you must, and end it fast before the 500 Storm zaps and forced shields add up.
cheatNotes: Any damage or pierce Charm, Trap, Aura, or Global you cast makes Drake zap the target for 500 Storm damage with a Storm Duck Savage.
Multi-target buffs redirect that Duck Savage onto you, the caster, so single-target your hitter's blades to keep the hit off yourself.
Secondary effects (like the blade riders on some spells) also set off the Duck Savage cheat, so account for hidden buffs.
Quentin counter-casts a spell in response to specific hanging effects you play, some helping you and some helping the bosses.
Even secondary effects, such as the blade from Sound of Musicology, trigger Quentin's counter.
A single-target helpful Charm on an ally makes Quentin cast Weakness on that ally.
A helpful Charm on all allies makes Quentin cast Mass Weakness on your team.
A single-target harmful Charm on an enemy gives that enemy a Balanceblade; you can bait this to hand yourself nothing but note it buffs the boss.
Starfall also counts as the harmful-Charm trigger for this cheat.
A harmful Charm on all enemies makes Quentin cast Bladestorm (+25%) for the bosses.
A single-target helpful Ward on an ally makes Quentin cast Hex on that ally.
A helpful Ward on all allies makes Quentin cast Mass Hex on your team.
A single-target harmful Ward on an enemy gives that enemy a Balance Tower Shield; useful to bait a shield onto Drake if you plan to shatter it.
Attenuate also counts as the harmful-Ward trigger.
A harmful Ward on all enemies makes Quentin cast Legion Shield for the bosses.
